textByHashes.926b1a62ef5774bf5b44817b6002d31032d682de: Hello, welcome to the Civic Office of West Ardougne. How can I help you?
textByHashes.89d010c5d9c1c6051f8ca709806fbec80abc10e1: The city warder Bravek is in there.
textByHashes.4434e8a828d74094ca2db5717b8f337845178397: He has asked not to be disturbed.
textByHashes.93b400074e0d79a2965bd592e52919a95aa868c7: Sorry, I don't have time to talk. Bravek needs lots of help running the city.
textByHashes.ad75b332f21ccfa06a94f86a1fdaeb3d6497e231: Rather you than me! The mourners normally deal with that stuff, you should speak to them. Their headquarters are right near the city gate.
textByHashes.fd7cc111e5b09baeb3b8632df6d9d3196915750d: Well, they do know what they're doing here. If they did start doing something badly Bravek, the city warder, would have the power to override them. I can't see that happening though.
textByHashes.bfefbbc7b352c44d9474e8ac96e584af4584a913: I'll see what I can do I suppose.
textByHashes.52864bc4689f6cc09c3c91bd18812e7cff742444: Mr Bravek, there's a man here who really needs to speak to you.
textByHashes.2c5040fd1add16747852fbac36fb922f0dcf2acd: Mr Bravek, there's a lady here who really needs to speak to you.
textByHashes.93da8ddf7fda2e17ca751ca364191140d7f9ddb4: Mr Bravek, there's someone here who really needs to speak to you.
textByHashes.a05f9bf2e3a08cc9ea08fe8066964b22d17a66e5: Oh I don't know, an hour or so maybe.
textByHashes.8ece0c51d025acb9480e1aefe9c7d0bcf5515d5e: Bravek will see you now but keep it short!
textByHashes.b6c80781491679d704f2572a1ed6b7b7749511b6: What do you think you're doing?
textByHashes.a6a62b03a524efe754c3a53551444c8a7807e822: But that food is for the people. Without it they will starve!
textByHashes.7a5fba9562388d4bd32fca77f41666a4d0185b9b: A lot of people are going to be angry about this!
textByHashes.5171cecd0961be2fdceada2c85583b0321407845: My name is Clerk. I work on gathering people together to form what we call clans.
textByHashes.55ba4f1d8a2d36bfe632ca9bc6a7350463ebdff4: Ah, clans. Where do I begin? Clans are groups of people gathered together for numerous reasons. Usually they have shared interests, like activities they enjoy together.
textByHashes.b044c2a4b0104522ad2dd1c1f335fc32b6425fa3: These activities could include improving certain skills, battling the same monsters, or even battling other clans!
textByHashes.0db2642f5652260e2a7d9768a0d6937718f602a9: Other clans form together because they just enjoy the company of other like-minded people. The clan community can be a great resource if you should ever need help with anything.
textByHashes.4e6497d2c07ef8850b065d5c26bc5bcbece9c178: You can either form your own clan with your friends, or apply to an already existing clan.
textByHashes.e4fecac15e38cbc3cfd61c9e8199c8da2fdfb4cd: Should you choose to form your own clan you will need four friends to join you, and it is recommended that you have spent a good amount of time in this world first. Leadership is not for everyone.
textByHashes.bb4d1f176d98abc879bf3854d1e74d66d76c9f64: However, fret not. There are plenty of interesting and exciting clans out there! Check out the clan recruitment board to see which clans are currently accepting applications.
textByHashes.babdb7b08c395e60d5a06dda746c62138fa6859f: Clans offer you the ability to have an official gathering of friends or like-minded individuals in a hierarchical structure.
textByHashes.2cac7fb1083e62be84a563d78e0dc363f04b2383: In other words, you and your friends get an exclusive chat channel and a Clan Hall, as well as the ability to assign ranks to members.
textByHashes.6099b202bcbd3a249cd281ac61b4d6932e054318: Ranks can be assigned from custom pre-sets, which then determine what permissions that person has.
textByHashes.95867fc1078137ecb0321626b04b6b0f532f5b46: For example: One person may have the rank to kick players from the chat, while another has the rank to access the Clan Coffer.
textByHashes.19443786c1659b45e2146e7dedad2907ff744dd7: The Clan Coffer is a shared coin store, used by members of the clan. Highly ranked members can assign who has permission to deposit and withdraw coins.
textByHashes.abc8ce0a38bfce00e0b64b4f6a6193fb4bd1b338: A Clan Hall is a private area only accessible for the people with the permission to enter. High ranked members of the clan can restrict it to only allow certain ranks in, or open it up to even allow guests.
textByHashes.bb3e914ff18016fa7f9d14719d42af208ae97c1a: The beauty of it is that you can have both. You can keep your house for private guests and your own personal use, but when you wish to see larger groups then the Clan Hall may be more fitting.
textByHashes.0a3388f42f04f5a803459838c32e25ff307c6d52: My mission is to administer clans; I help form them and can tell you anything you need to know about them.
textByHashes.c9d32489899bc1a2545317cf24d7d09e6de55216: Why does anyone go anywhere? As a gatherer of people, I go where people gather. The Grand Exchange is known to be a place where people come together. What better place to bring them even closer?
textByHashes.d516c24377f6d883488264a0209160b53bc16b2f: Very much so. I was lucky to find this charming corner to set up the clan hub.
textByHashes.db494a34d87c2ddebeb143e2e6a4e42eb18cebcb: The clan hub is what I call this area, my little corner of the Grand Exchange. This is where every clan is born, as well as the best place to look for new recruits.
textByHashes.d3d1bd25ff57e1224b39e05693f18d719e48354e: If you're in a clan you can also access your Clan Hall from here.
textByHashes.5de3be8f2da3aa99b3114fb0d29afe290c03a883: I've got cloaks that let you show your clan's colours, and vexilla to help you recruit more people into your clan, but you don't have space to take any.
textByHashes.e8b864fc714f1670b719b46800b2848aa18444a6: Yes, you should! Now, did you want to ask me anything else while you're here?
textByHashes.d8466032b65d6673683adc675e3a2951ea9f4946: Certainly. I've got cloaks that let you show your clan's colours, and vexilla to help you recruit more people into your clan.
textByHashes.b2aaaafc543450e467587ae33316b9e1ab77d817: Sorry, you'll have to come back another day. I'm not ready to serve you yet.
textByHashes.823eb499847fe582f38726277555fa30019b71e4: The people of Hosidius require sulphurous fertiliser for the farms. I see you have buckets here, and more in the bank. We require buckets.
textByHashes.197dae308507775bbc4544d8f332583823ef6c0b: Do you wish to donate your fertiliser? We'll take what we need directly from your bank.
textByHashes.d7e62bddaa342555c50e86a4a2f6166225c4744b: The people of Hosidius require sulphurous fertiliser for the farms. We currently require buckets. Do come back if you every get any you'd be willing to donate.
textByHashes.86ccd303fc291c47d35320b1dbb0f7f70c084de5: If you were planning to bring any fertiliser for the stores, please try again later. The stores are very full at present.
